artifact.signing: local debug keystore used by the generated release variant; not store signing

three force-stop launches reached accessibility nodes for 今晚去观星, 游客模式, 本机设置已同步 and the persisted 观星地图 tab; measured ActivityManager TotalTime values were 17392 ms, 14238 ms and 13207 ms

No FATAL EXCEPTION, app ANR, ReactNativeJS Error/Exception, or unable-to-load-script entry in any sampled cold-start or navigation run

limitations: The generated native Android project and APK are ignored so app.json and Expo config plugins remain the CNG configuration authority.
The release-style variant uses a local debug keystore and is machine evidence only; it is not a signed store release artifact.
Emulator evidence does not satisfy representative Android device, low-power, low-brightness, weak-network, offline-restart, or outdoor field validation.
